一朝穿越回三国，居然变成了人中吕布？
等等？这里是徐州下邳？还是建安三年底？
如果不出意外的话，自己是不是再过几天就要魂断白门楼了？
这一世，看我练强兵，斗诸侯，取天下，为万世开太平！
（PS：本书剧情依史演义，总体背景以三国志等正史为蓝本，权策流，杀伐果断，不后宫，无系统。）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/fedccdc82013ce096952be8c16977c4d","author":"载酒青衣客","author_id":"","book_id":"7239594222418922554","book_name":"三国：从义父杀手到逆袭教父","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":67,"name":"三国","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=67&name=三国&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7240773538163098152","read_count":"29683","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"3956288"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.7","serial_count":"1908","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,三国","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/546937f765ecf827804bb67ab531928a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779445349&x-signature=yHkWD%2F%2BjGr7RFMBFD5z33JqwJj4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3051852587336600","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"3"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231822284D6BFA11F7A7A1BC0A4B"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":12,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":6207},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1704350617,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}}," :false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7584098528915817240","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"三国吕布：逆转下邳，我不拜义父
载酒青衣客 作
三国的历史文，我好久不看了，剧情不错吧，不空洞，有自己的心意，我能看的下去。
要说多么的惊艳，倒也不至于。主角作为一个穿越者，但很多时候总有一种太过融入时代的感觉。
这样的形象其实不差，但就是少了几分网文的那种轻松爽快的感觉。
但读起来还可以，对我来说，保底四星吧。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1765811461,"group_id":"7239594222418922554","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"低徊愧人子，不敢叹风尘。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N22PDUNVYZH4Sjhtozyxz/k4duvLUdho8tcC9vdK0Orq","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/aa4e05f02a5442e1a6b4f3b48fae9ab2~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793744&x-signature=kwBLJAin0gJAnlmGKuVWXuS4i3s%3D","user_id":"4182960349653693","user_name":"兔子先生在流浪"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4182960349653693","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1739998634,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7239594222418922554","book_info":{"abstract":"【权谋】+【热血】+【无系统】
